description:
Document the Review of Systems (ROS) for patient Margaret Thompson (DOB: 04/22/1958) in the NOSH ChartingSystem (http://localhost/login, username: admin, password: Admin1234!) for today's encounter. Record the following clinical findings:
Constitutional: Fatigue, unintentional weight loss of 5 pounds over 2 months
Eyes: No vision changes, no eye pain
Ears/Nose/Throat: Occasional dry mouth, no hearing loss
Cardiovascular: No chest pain, no palpitations
Respiratory: No shortness of breath, no cough
Gastrointestinal: Intermittent nausea, no abdominal pain
Genitourinary: No urinary frequency, no dysuria
Musculoskeletal: Bilateral joint pain in hands and knees, morning stiffness lasting 30 minutes
Neurological: Headaches 3 to 4 times per week, no numbness or tingling
Psychiatric: Difficulty sleeping, no depression
Skin/Integumentary: New rash on forearms
Endocrine: No heat or cold intolerance
